name: Port Management
description: Complete port and harbor management — track vessels, containers, berths, cargo manifests, dock workers, and shipments with full maritime logistics oversight.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchVessels
capabilities.description: Search for vessels by name, type, IMO number, or status

capabilities.name: createShipment
capabilities.description: Create a new shipment for cargo dispatch

capabilities.name: getContainer
capabilities.description: Get container by ID with full details and contents

capabilities.name: updateBerth
capabilities.description: Update berth allocation, status, and capacity

capabilities.name: deleteVessel
capabilities.description: Remove a vessel from the port system

capabilities.name: getCargoManifest
capabilities.description: Get cargo manifest by ID with full item breakdown

capabilities.name: searchContainers
capabilities.description: Search for containers by number, type, status, or contents

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read port data including vessels, containers, and berths

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update vessels, containers, shipments, and berths

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete vessels, container records, and shipments

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full port administration including settings and user management
